log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

--- Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: 46/67
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: 26/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 26/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: 7/67
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: -10/67
